name: jaydee-kanban
description: Monorepo du tableau Kanban Jaydee — backend API REST (Node/Express/Prisma/MySQL) + frontend (React/Bootstrap/Vite), gérés via npm workspaces.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm test -w backend && npm test -w frontend

author: Rukundo Ronaldo
